security_gap.gap_description: Vulnerabilities in the staking contract allow unauthorized control or state manipulation.

actor_risk.description: Entity running a validator node to secure the network.

assumptions: A critical vulnerability exists in the staking smart contract logic.
An attacker can craft malicious calls to the staking contract to gain unauthorized control over staked funds or contract state.

mitigation.strategy: Conduct rigorous security audits and formal verification of the staking smart contract.

description: An attacker exploits a vulnerability in the staking smart contract on the Berachain L1 (Component 1) used for staking $BERA (Asset 1) by a Validator Operator (Actor 2), gaining unauthorized control over staked assets or contract functions.
